<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="zh-TW">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>薯條的天堂漫遊</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@300;400;700&family=Ma+Shan+Zheng&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#06021a;font-family:"Noto Serif TC",serif;touch-action:none;}
canvas#gc{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;display:block;}

/* ── INTRO ── */
#intro{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 42%,#1c0e35,#07031a);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:2rem;transition:opacity 1.5s ease;}
#intro.hide{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}
.ic{width:clamp(130px,35vw,170px);height:clamp(130px,35vw,170px);border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid rgba(212,168,74,.5);box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(212,168,74,.35);margin-bottom:1em;animation:ifl 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes ifl{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}
.it{font-family:“Ma Shan Zheng”,cursive;font-size:clamp(2rem,7vw,3.5rem);color:#e8c870;letter-spacing:.2em;text-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(220,180,80,.5);animation:fu .9s .3s both;}
.is{font-size:.76rem;color:rgba(220,180,80,.5);letter-spacing:.4em;margin:.3em 0 1em;animation:fu .9s .5s both;}
.id{max-width:300px;text-align:center;font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.9;color:rgba(240,228,200,.65);margin-bottom:1.5em;animation:fu .9s .7s both;}
.ibtn{border:1px solid rgba(220,180,80,.45);background:transparent;color:#e8c870;font-family:“Noto Serif TC”,serif;font-size:1rem;padding:.85em 3em;letter-spacing:.3em;cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:color .4s;animation:fu .9s .9s both;}
.ibtn::before{content:””;position:absolute;inset:0;background:#e8c870;transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .4s;z-index:-1;}
.ibtn:active{color:#07031a;}.ibtn:active::before{transform:scaleX(1);}
@keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ── STAGE TITLE ── */
#stage-title{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:150;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;background:rgba(6,2,26,.85);pointer-events:none;}
#stage-title.show{display:flex;}
.st-num{font-size:.7rem;color:rgba(212,168,74,.6);letter-spacing:.5em;margin-bottom:.5em;}
.st-name{font-family:“Ma Shan Zheng”,cursive;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,7vw,3.2rem);color:#f0cc70;text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(212,168,74,.5);text-align:center;}
.st-desc{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(240,228,200,.6);margin-top:.6em;text-align:center;max-width:260px;line-height:1.8;}

/* ── HUD ── */
#hud{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:30;padding:.6rem 1rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;pointer-events:none;}
#stage-lbl{background:rgba(6,2,26,.82);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.28);padding:.3rem .8rem;font-size:.72rem;color:#d4a84a;font-family:“Ma Shan Zheng”,cursive;letter-spacing:.08em;}
#progress-bar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#d4a84a,#f0cc70);transition:width .4s ease;z-index:31;}
#score-display{background:rgba(6,2,26,.82);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.28);padding:.3rem .8rem;font-size:.72rem;color:#d4a84a;letter-spacing:.05em;}

/* ── DIALOG ── */
#dlg{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:50;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
#dlg.show{transform:translateY(0);}
.db{background:rgba(5,2,16,.96);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.28);border-bottom:none;padding:.9rem 1.3rem .8rem;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;}
.db::before{content:””;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#d4a84a,transparent);}
.dsp{font-family:“Ma Shan Zheng”,cursive;font-size:.74rem;color:#d4a84a;letter-spacing:.2em;margin-bottom:.4rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;}
.sdt{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#d4a84a;animation:sdt 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes sdt{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2}}
#dtxt{font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.95;color:#f0e6cc;font-weight:300;min-height:1.7em;}
.dhint{text-align:right;font-size:.62rem;color:rgba(212,168,74,.4);margin-top:.3rem;animation:bl 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes bl{0%,100%{opacity:.3}50%{opacity:.9}}

/* ── CHOICES ── */
#choices{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:50;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
#choices.show{transform:translateY(0);}
.ci{background:rgba(5,2,16,.96);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.28);border-bottom:none;padding:.8rem 1rem .7rem;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;}
.ci::before{content:””;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#d4a84a,transparent);}
.clbl{font-size:.62rem;color:rgba(212,168,74,.5);letter-spacing:.25em;margin-bottom:.6rem;}
.cbtn{display:block;width:100%;background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.18);color:#f0e6cc;font-family:“Noto Serif TC”,serif;font-size:.86rem;padding:.65rem .9rem;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;line-height:1.5;}
.cbtn:active{border-color:rgba(212,168,74,.5);background:rgba(212,168,74,.08);color:#f0cc70;}

/* ── CONTROLS ── */
#ctrl{position:fixed;bottom:.7rem;left:0;right:0;z-index:40;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;padding:0 .8rem;pointer-events:none;}
#joyStick{width:110px;height:110px;pointer-events:all;}
.sb{width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(212,168,74,.07);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.2);position:relative;}
.sk{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(212,168,74,.4);border:1.5px solid rgba(212,168,74,.6);position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none;}
#action-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;pointer-events:all;}
.abtn{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(212,168,74,.4);background:rgba(212,168,74,.18);color:#d4a84a;font-size:.7rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:.03em;}
.abtn:active{background:rgba(212,168,74,.4);}
#jump-btn{border-color:rgba(100,180,255,.5);background:rgba(100,180,255,.15);color:rgba(100,180,255,.9);}
#interact-btn{border-color:rgba(212,168,74,.5);background:rgba(212,168,74,.22);}

/* ── FLASH ── */
#flash{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;background:#06021a;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .5s;}
#flash.on{opacity:1;}
#flash.white{background:#fffef0;}

/* ── ENDING ── */
#ending{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:300;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,#120a05,#07031a);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:2rem;}
#ending.show{display:flex;animation:fu 1s both;}
.ec{width:90px;height:90px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid rgba(212,168,74,.45);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(212,168,74,.35);margin-bottom:.9em;animation:ifl 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
.et{font-family:“Ma Shan Zheng”,cursive;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,6vw,3rem);color:#e8c870;letter-spacing:.15em;text-align:center;margin-bottom:.5em;text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(220,180,80,.5);}
.eb{max-width:340px;text-align:center;font-size:.88rem;line-height:2.2;color:rgba(240,228,200,.85);margin-bottom:1.1em;}
.ei{font-size:1.6rem;letter-spacing:.5em;margin-bottom:1.2em;}
.ebtn{border:1px solid rgba(220,180,80,.35);background:transparent;color:#e8c870;font-family:“Noto Serif TC”,serif;font-size:.9rem;padding:.7em 2.5em;letter-spacing:.2em;cursor:pointer;}

/* Heart particle */
.heart-particle{position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:200;font-size:1.4rem;animation:heartRise 1.5s ease-out forwards;}
@keyframes heartRise{0%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-80px) scale(0.4)}}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<div id="intro">
  <img class="ic" id="coverImg" alt="薯條">
  <div class="it">薯條的天堂漫遊</div>
  <div class="is">四段旅程 · 療癒冒險</div>
  <div class="id">跟著薯條，走過記憶、星空、彩虹，<br>最後在夢裡道別。</div>
  <button class="ibtn" id="startBtn">開始旅程 ✦</button>
</div>

<div id="ending">
  <img class="ec" id="endCover" alt="薯條">
  <div class="et">薯條，謝謝你 🌟</div>
  <div class="eb">謝謝你陪我長大。<br>我現在在天堂過得很好，<br>有很多草草和夥伴。<br><br>不要為我哭泣喔……<br><em style="color:#e8c870">我會變成天上的星星守護你。</em></div>
  <div class="ei">☸️ ☯️ ✝️ 🕊️</div>
  <button class="ebtn" id="replayBtn">再陪薯條走一次</button>
</div>

<div id="stage-title">
  <div class="st-num" id="st-num"></div>
  <div class="st-name" id="st-name"></div>
  <div class="st-desc" id="st-desc"></div>
</div>

<div id="progress-bar" style="width:0%"></div>
<div id="hud">
  <div id="stage-lbl">第一章</div>
  <div id="score-display">💛 0 / 0</div>
  <button id="music-btn" style="background:rgba(5,2,16,.82);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.28);color:#d4a84a;font-size:1rem;padding:.3rem .6rem;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:.05em;pointer-events:all;">🔔</button>
</div>

<div id="flash"></div>
<canvas id="gc"></canvas>

<div id="dlg">
  <div class="db">
    <div class="dsp"><div class="sdt"></div><span id="dsp">薯條</span></div>
    <div id="dtxt"></div>
    <div class="dhint" id="dhint" style="opacity:0">點擊繼續 ▾</div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="choices">
  <div class="ci">
    <div class="clbl">你的心意</div>
    <div id="clist"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="ctrl">
  <div id="joyStick"><div class="sb"><div class="sk" id="sk"></div></div></div>
  <div id="action-btns">
    <div class="abtn" id="jump-btn">跳</div>
    <div class="abtn" id="interact-btn">互動</div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ── IMAGES ────────────────────────────────────────────
// Images will be injected here by Python
const IMG_COVER = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,';
const IMG_H = {h1:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',h2:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',h3:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',h4:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',h5:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',h6:'data:image/jpeg;base64,'};

// Set images safely after DOM ready
function setImages(){
  var ci=document.getElementById('coverImg');
  var ec=document.getElementById('endCover');
  if(ci) ci.src=IMG_COVER;
  if(ec) ec.src=IMG_COVER;
}
if(document.readyState==='loading'){
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',setImages);
} else {
  setImages();
}

const IMG_RABBIT = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";
const IMG_OWNER = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";
// Pre-load extra images
const ownerImg = new Image(); ownerImg.src = IMG_OWNER;
const rabbitCardImg = new Image(); rabbitCardImg.src = IMG_RABBIT;
const VIDEOS = ["pEKe2qVNVI0", "WEIJhHGXMSk", "RxfW8U5Ejt8", "XDm2FbCouCA", "xf9rZ7jngps", "PExnLLEBW90", "uV8cgSvDkRk", "Wg-ZsE6stGA", "8NrEGKBr0hg", "RYtwxqp8_yk", "_u2wX1sKJys", "41E4RGYXv-M", "q4HxC2YC3Y0", "fbCVIPo3o8o", "OLEq2sdZVtY"];
let videoIndex = 0;

// Pre-load scene images
const sceneImgs = {};
Object.entries(IMG_H).forEach(([k,v])=>{
  const i=new Image(); i.src=v; sceneImgs[k]=i;
});

// ── CANVAS ────────────────────────────────────────────
const gc = document.getElementById('gc');
const ctx = gc.getContext('2d');
let W, H;
function resize(){W=gc.width=window.innerWidth;H=gc.height=window.innerHeight;}
resize(); window.addEventListener('resize',resize);

// ── GAME STATE ────────────────────────────────────────
let stage = 0;       // 0=s1 1=s2 2=s3 3=s4
let gameRunning = false;
let dlgOpen = false;
let stageComplete = false;

// Player
const player = {
  x:0, y:0, vy:0, vx:0,
  w:36, h:44,
  onGround:false,
  facing:1,
  anim:0,        // walk cycle
  glowing:false,
  ghostAlpha:0.9
};

// ── STAGE DEFINITIONS ─────────────────────────────────
const STAGES = [
  {
    num:'第一章', name:'熟悉的起點',
    desc:'在最後的房間裡，和每件物品說再見',
    bgKey:'h1', bgColor:['#1a0d0a','#3a1a10','#2a1008'],
    lbl:'🏠 記憶碎片'
  },
  {
    num:'第二章', name:'星願草地',
    desc:'在粉紅雲海間跳躍，喚醒星光神鹿',
    bgKey:'h3', bgColor:['#0a0525','#1e0d50','#38186a'],
    lbl:'⭐ 星願草地'
  },
  {
    num:'第三章', name:'彩虹試煉',
    desc:'穿越彩虹河流，與其他靈魂同行',
    bgKey:'h5', bgColor:['#061a10','#0a2818','#0e3020'],
    lbl:'🌈 彩虹試煉'
  },
  {
    num:'第四章', name:'最後的信號',
    desc:'跳進主人的夢裡，說最後一聲謝謝',
    bgKey:'h6', bgColor:['#0a0808','#1a1005','#120a03'],
    lbl:'💫 託夢'
  }
];

// ── ITEMS PER STAGE ───────────────────────────────────
// Stage 1: Memory items in the room
let memItems = [];
let platforms = [];
let collectibles = [];
let enemies = [];  // stage 3: moving blocks
let npc = null;    // stage 2: deer, stage 4: owner
let stageScore = 0, stageTotal = 0;
let particles = [];
let t = 0;
let cameraX = 0;

// ── PHYSICS ───────────────────────────────────────────
const GRAVITY = 0.55;
const JUMP_FORCE = -13;
const PSPEED = 3.5;
const FLOOR_Y = () => H * 0.72;

// ── DIALOG ENGINE ─────────────────────────────────────
const dlgEl=document.getElementById('dlg'), choicesEl=document.getElementById('choices');
const dspEl=document.getElementById('dsp'), dtxtEl=document.getElementById('dtxt'), dhintEl=document.getElementById('dhint');
const clistEl=document.getElementById('clist');
let dlgQueue=[], typing=false, waitClick=false, typeTimer=null, dlgCB=null;

function showDlg(sp,text,cb){
  dlgOpen=true; dlgEl.classList.add('show'); choicesEl.classList.remove('show');
  dspEl.textContent=sp; dtxtEl.textContent=''; dhintEl.style.opacity='0';
  typing=true; waitClick=false; let i=0; clearTimeout(typeTimer);
  dlgCB=cb||null;
  (function go(){if(i<text.length){dtxtEl.textContent+=text[i++];typeTimer=setTimeout(go,35);}
    else{typing=false;waitClick=true;dhintEl.style.opacity='1';}})();
}
function showChoices(arr, cb){
  dlgOpen=true; dlgEl.classList.remove('show'); choicesEl.classList.add('show');
  clistEl.innerHTML='';
  arr.forEach(c=>{
    const b=document.createElement('button'); b.className='cbtn'; b.textContent=c.text;
    b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
      choicesEl.classList.remove('show'); dlgOpen=false;
      if(c.then)showDlgSeq(c.then, cb); else if(cb)cb(c.id);
    }); clistEl.appendChild(b);
  });
}
function showDlgSeq(seq, finalCB){
  if(!seq||seq.length===0){dlgEl.classList.remove('show');dlgOpen=false;if(finalCB)finalCB();return;}
  const [first,...rest]=seq;
  if(first.type==='choice'){showChoices(first.choices,()=>showDlgSeq(rest,finalCB));return;}
  showDlg(first.sp,first.text,()=>showDlgSeq(rest,finalCB));
}
function advanceDlg(){
  if(typing){clearTimeout(typeTimer);if(dlgQueue[0])dtxtEl.textContent=dlgQueue[0].text;typing=false;waitClick=true;dhintEl.style.opacity='1';return;}
  if(!waitClick)return;
  dlgEl.classList.remove('show'); dlgOpen=false; waitClick=false;
  if(dlgCB){const f=dlgCB;dlgCB=null;f();}
}
dlgEl.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{e.preventDefault();advanceDlg();},{passive:false});
dlgEl.addEventListener('click',advanceDlg);

// ── HUD UPDATE ────────────────────────────────────────
function updateHUD(){
  document.getElementById('stage-lbl').textContent=STAGES[stage].lbl;
  document.getElementById('score-display').textContent=`💛 ${stageScore} / ${stageTotal}`;
  const pct = stageTotal>0 ? (stageScore/stageTotal*100*(stage+1)/4) : (stage/4*100);
  document.getElementById('progress-bar').style.width=pct+'%';
}

// ── STAGE INTRO ───────────────────────────────────────
function showStageTitle(s, cb){
  const el=document.getElementById('stage-title');
  document.getElementById('st-num').textContent=STAGES[s].num;
  document.getElementById('st-name').textContent=STAGES[s].name;
  document.getElementById('st-desc').textContent=STAGES[s].desc;
  el.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>{el.classList.remove('show');if(cb)cb();},2800);
}

// ── PARTICLES ─────────────────────────────────────────
function spawnParticles(x,y,col,n=6){
  for(let i=0;i<n;i++){
    const ang=Math.random()*Math.PI*2, sp=1.5+Math.random()*3;
    particles.push({x,y,vx:Math.cos(ang)*sp,vy:Math.sin(ang)*sp-2,life:1,col,r:2+Math.random()*3});
  }
}
function spawnHeart(x,y){
  const el=document.createElement('div'); el.className='heart-particle'; el.textContent='💛';
  el.style.left=x+'px'; el.style.top=y+'px'; document.body.appendChild(el);
  setTimeout(()=>el.remove(),1500);
}

// ── STAGE 1: ROOM ─────────────────────────────────────
function initStage1(){
  stageScore=0; stageTotal=5; stage=0; cameraX=0;
  player.x=80; player.y=FLOOR_Y()-player.h; player.vy=0; player.vx=0;
  platforms=[
    {x:0,    y:FLOOR_Y(), w:W*3,  h:30, col:'#3a2010'},
    {x:180,  y:FLOOR_Y()-90, w:100, h:18, col:'#5a3820'},
    {x:380,  y:FLOOR_Y()-130,w:80,  h:18, col:'#5a3820'},
    {x:560,  y:FLOOR_Y()-80, w:90,  h:18, col:'#5a3820'},
    {x:750,  y:FLOOR_Y()-110,w:100, h:18, col:'#5a3820'},
  ];
  memItems=[
    {x:140, y:FLOOR_Y()-50,  w:32,h:40, col:'#ff8040', icon:'🥕', label:'胡蘿蔔盆栽', text:'第一次吃到胡蘿蔔的驚喜表情……', done:false},
    {x:230, y:FLOOR_Y()-135, w:32,h:40, col:'#ff6080', icon:'🍓', label:'草莓隧道',   text:'鑽進鑽出，每次都好開心……',     done:false},
    {x:430, y:FLOOR_Y()-175, w:32,h:40, col:'#4080ff', icon:'🏰', label:'城堡跳台',   text:'站在最高處，耳朵迎風飄啊飄……', done:false},
    {x:620, y:FLOOR_Y()-125, w:32,h:40, col:'#ffd040', icon:'⭐', label:'最愛的角落', text:'這個角落的陽光最暖……',           done:false},
    {x:800, y:FLOOR_Y()-155, w:32,h:40, col:'#40ffb0', icon:'🌿', label:'草地窩',     text:'謝謝你，讓我住在這裡……',         done:false},
  ];
  collectibles=[]; particles=[];
  updateHUD();
}

// ── STAGE 2: STAR FIELD ───────────────────────────────
let deer={x:0,y:0,awake:false,progress:0};
function initStage2(){
  stageScore=0; stageTotal=4; stage=1; cameraX=0;
  player.x=80; player.y=FLOOR_Y()-player.h; player.vy=0;
  // Cloud platforms — wider gaps, lower height so player can reach
  const FY = FLOOR_Y();
  platforms=[
    {x:0,   y:FY,      w:200, h:28, col:'rgba(220,180,255,0.65)', cloud:true},
    {x:240, y:FY-70,   w:150, h:26, col:'rgba(220,180,255,0.65)', cloud:true},
    {x:430, y:FY-130,  w:140, h:26, col:'rgba(220,180,255,0.65)', cloud:true},
    {x:610, y:FY-60,   w:150, h:26, col:'rgba(220,180,255,0.65)', cloud:true},
    {x:800, y:FY-110,  w:140, h:26, col:'rgba(220,180,255,0.65)', cloud:true},
    {x:980, y:FY-70,   w:180, h:28, col:'rgba(220,180,255,0.7)',  cloud:true},
  ];
  // Dark clouds placed directly ON top of each platform (reachable!)
  memItems=[
    {x:270,  y:FY-120, w:44,h:44, col:'#5060a0', icon:'🌑', label:'悲傷之雲1', text:'站起來！讓我看看你的勇敢！', done:false},
    {x:460,  y:FY-180, w:44,h:44, col:'#5060a0', icon:'🌑', label:'悲傷之雲2', text:'轉個圈！讓悲傷散去！',       done:false},
    {x:640,  y:FY-110, w:44,h:44, col:'#5060a0', icon:'🌑', label:'悲傷之雲3', text:'賣個萌！讓愛的光照進來！',   done:false},
    {x:830,  y:FY-160, w:44,h:44, col:'#5060a0', icon:'🌑', label:'悲傷之雲4', text:'最後一片雲……把它趕走吧！',   done:false},
  ];
  deer={x:1080,y:FY-100,awake:false,progress:0};
  particles=[];
  updateHUD();
}

// ── STAGE 3: RAINBOW ──────────────────────────────────
let rainbowTimer=0;
function initStage3(){
  stageScore=0; stageTotal=5; stage=2; cameraX=0;
  player.x=80; player.y=FLOOR_Y()-player.h; player.vy=0;
  platforms=[
    {x:0,   y:FLOOR_Y(),     w:150, h:20, col:'#40a040'},
    {x:200, y:FLOOR_Y()-60,  w:80,  h:18, col:'#ff4060', moving:true, mx:200,mw:200,mspd:1.2},
    {x:360, y:FLOOR_Y()-110, w:80,  h:18, col:'#ffa020', moving:true, mx:360,mw:180,mspd:-1.5},
    {x:550, y:FLOOR_Y()-70,  w:80,  h:18, col:'#40c0ff', moving:true, mx:550,mw:200,mspd:1.0},
    {x:750, y:FLOOR_Y()-120, w:80,  h:18, col:'#c040ff', moving:true, mx:750,mw:180,mspd:-1.2},
    {x:940, y:FLOOR_Y()-80,  w:120, h:20, col:'#ffd040'},
    {x:1100,y:FLOOR_Y(),     w:300, h:20, col:'#40a040'},
  ];
  // Soul friends to meet
  memItems=[
    {x:250, y:FLOOR_Y()-108, w:28,h:35, col:'#ff80a0', icon:'🐱', label:'小貓靈魂', text:'喵～我也在等主人呢。我們一起玩吧！', done:false},
    {x:420, y:FLOOR_Y()-158, w:28,h:35, col:'#a080ff', icon:'🐶', label:'小狗靈魂', text:'汪！加入我們！天堂有好多夥伴！',     done:false},
    {x:610, y:FLOOR_Y()-118, w:28,h:35, col:'#80ffb0', icon:'🐹', label:'倉鼠靈魂', text:'你好呀！這裡無邊無際，跑不完！',     done:false},
    {x:810, y:FLOOR_Y()-168, w:28,h:35, col:'#ffd060', icon:'🐦', label:'小鳥靈魂', text:'嘰嘰！走吧，天堂大門快到了！',       done:false},
    {x:1000,y:FLOOR_Y()-128, w:28,h:35, col:'#ff8040', icon:'🌟', label:'勇氣之光', text:'得到所有夥伴的力量！大門開了！',     done:false},
  ];
  particles=[];
  updateHUD();
}

// ── STAGE 4: DREAM ────────────────────────────────────
let ownerNudged=false, dreamHearts=0;
function initStage4(){
  stageScore=0; stageTotal=1; stage=3; cameraX=0;
  player.x=60; player.y=FLOOR_Y()-player.h; player.vy=0;
  // Long warm floor for the dream scene
  platforms=[
    {x:0,   y:FLOOR_Y(), w:800,  h:20, col:'#3a2010'},
  ];
  // No memItems needed — just walk to NPC and interact
  memItems=[];
  npc={x:420, y:FLOOR_Y()-80, w:50, h:70, state:'sleeping'};
  ownerNudged=false; dreamHearts=0;
  particles=[];
  updateHUD();
}

// ── INPUT ─────────────────────────────────────────────
const keys={};
const moveVec={x:0,y:0};
let stickOrig={x:0,y:0}, stickActive=false, stickId=-1;
let isMovingL=false, isMovingR=false;
const sk=document.getElementById('sk');
const stickEl=document.getElementById('joyStick');

function gcenter(el){const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return{x:r.left+r.width/2,y:r.top+r.height/2};}
function updStick(t){
  const dx=t.clientX-stickOrig.x,dy=t.clientY-stickOrig.y,len=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy),M=36;
  const cx=len>M?dx/len*M:dx, cy=len>M?dy/len*M:dy;
  sk.style.transform=`translate(calc(-50% + ${cx}px),calc(-50% + ${cy}px))`;
  moveVec.x=cx/M; moveVec.y=cy/M;
  isMovingL=moveVec.x<-0.3; isMovingR=moveVec.x>0.3;
}
stickEl.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{e.preventDefault();const tt=e.changedTouches[0];stickActive=true;stickId=tt.identifier;stickOrig=gcenter(stickEl.querySelector('.sb'));updStick(tt);},{passive:false});
document.addEventListener('touchmove',e=>{for(const tt of e.changedTouches){if(stickActive&&tt.identifier===stickId){e.preventDefault();updStick(tt);}}},{passive:false});
document.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{for(const tt of e.changedTouches){if(stickActive&&tt.identifier===stickId){stickActive=false;moveVec.x=0;moveVec.y=0;sk.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%)';isMovingL=false;isMovingR=false;}}});

document.getElementById('jump-btn').addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{e.preventDefault();doJump();},{passive:false});
document.getElementById('jump-btn').addEventListener('click',doJump);
document.getElementById('interact-btn').addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{e.preventDefault();doInteract();},{passive:false});
document.getElementById('interact-btn').addEventListener('click',doInteract);

document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{keys[e.code]=true;
  if(e.code==='Space'||e.code==='ArrowUp')doJump();
  if(e.code==='KeyE'||e.code==='Enter'){if(dlgOpen)advanceDlg();else doInteract();}
});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>keys[e.code]=false);

function doJump(){
  if(dlgOpen)return;
  if(player.onGround){player.vy=JUMP_FORCE;player.onGround=false;}
}
function doInteract(){
  if(dlgOpen){advanceDlg();return;}
  checkInteract();
}

// ── PHYSICS UPDATE ────────────────────────────────────
function updatePhysics(){
  if(dlgOpen)return;
  // Horizontal
  let dx=0;
  if(isMovingL||keys['ArrowLeft']||keys['KeyA'])dx=-1;
  if(isMovingR||keys['ArrowRight']||keys['KeyD'])dx=1;
  if(moveVec.x!==0)dx=moveVec.x;
  player.vx = dx * PSPEED;
  if(dx!==0)player.facing=dx>0?1:-1;

  player.x += player.vx;
  player.vy += GRAVITY;
  player.y += player.vy;
  player.anim += Math.abs(player.vx)*0.12;

  // Platform collision
  player.onGround=false;
  platforms.forEach(p=>{
    // Moving platforms
    if(p.moving){
      p.x+=p.mspd;
      if(p.x<p.mx||p.x>p.mx+p.mw)p.mspd*=-1;
    }
    const pw=p.w||100, ph=p.h||20;
    if(player.x+player.w>p.x && player.x<p.x+pw &&
       player.y+player.h>p.y && player.y+player.h<p.y+ph+player.vy+5 && player.vy>=0){
      player.y=p.y-player.h; player.vy=0; player.onGround=true;
      if(p.moving)player.x+=p.mspd;
    }
  });

  // World bounds
  player.x=Math.max(0,player.x);
  // Respawn if fell off screen
  if(player.y>H+60){
    // Find nearest platform to respawn on
    let bestP=platforms[0];
    platforms.forEach(p=>{if(Math.abs(p.x+p.w/2-player.x)<Math.abs(bestP.x+bestP.w/2-player.x))bestP=p;});
    player.x=Math.max(bestP.x+20, bestP.x+bestP.w/2-20);
    player.y=bestP.y-player.h;
    player.vy=0; player.vx=0;
    spawnParticles(player.x+player.w/2, player.y,'rgba(200,180,255,1)',8);
  }

  // Camera
  const targetCamX=player.x-W*0.35;
  cameraX+=(targetCamX-cameraX)*0.1;
  cameraX=Math.max(0,cameraX);
}

// ── INTERACT CHECK ────────────────────────────────────
function checkInteract(){
  // Check mem items — larger radius for stage 2
  const interactRadius = stage===1 ? 90 : 65;
  const interactRadiusY = stage===1 ? 110 : 90;
  memItems.forEach(item=>{
    if(item.done)return;
    const dist=Math.abs((player.x+player.w/2)-(item.x+item.w/2));
    const distY=Math.abs((player.y+player.h/2)-(item.y+item.h/2));
    if(dist<interactRadius&&distY<interactRadiusY){collectItem(item);}
  });
  // Stage 4: nudge owner — bigger radius
  if(stage===3&&npc&&!ownerNudged){
    const dist=Math.abs((player.x+player.w/2)-(npc.x+npc.w/2));
    if(dist<110){nudgeOwner();}
  }
}

function collectItem(item){
  if(item.done)return;
  item.done=true;
  stageScore++;
  spawnParticles(item.x+item.w/2, item.y+item.h/2, item.col, 12);
  spawnHeart(item.x-cameraX+item.w/2, item.y+item.h/2);
  updateHUD();
  // Play video first, then show dialog
  playVideo(() => {
    const seq=[{sp:'薯條',text:item.text}];
    if(stage===1&&item.action){
      seq.push({sp:'星光神鹿',text:'善！用你的力量，把悲傷變成星光！'});
    }
    showDlgSeq(seq,()=>{
      if(stageScore>=stageTotal)setTimeout(()=>checkStageComplete(),800);
    });
  });
}

function nudgeOwner(){
  ownerNudged=true; stageScore=1;
  npc.state='smiling';
  updateHUD();
  spawnParticles(npc.x,npc.y,  '#ffd080',20);
  // Play final video, then dialog
  playVideo(() => {
  showDlgSeq([
    {sp:'薯條', text:'……主人，你能感覺到我嗎？'},
    {sp:'薯條', text:'謝謝你陪我長大。我現在在天堂過得很好。'},
    {sp:'薯條', text:'有很多草草，還有好多好多朋友。'},
    {type:'choice', choices:[
      {id:'a', text:'「不要為我哭泣……」',  then:[{sp:'薯條',text:'你的眼淚，我都看見了。但我真的很好，不用擔心我。'}]},
      {id:'b', text:'「我愛你，謝謝你。」', then:[{sp:'薯條',text:'我也愛你。永遠永遠。變成星星之後，我還是在的。'}]},
    ]},
    {sp:'旁白', text:'薯條輕輕蹭了蹭你的臉頰，化為滿天星光……'},
  ],()=>{
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const fl=document.getElementById('flash');
      fl.classList.add('white'); fl.classList.add('on');
      setTimeout(()=>{fl.classList.remove('on');document.getElementById('ending').classList.add('show');},1200);
    },600);
  });
  }); // end playVideo
}

// ── STAGE COMPLETE ────────────────────────────────────
function checkStageComplete(){
  if(stageComplete)return;
  stageComplete=true;
  const next=stage+1;
  if(next>3){checkStageComplete4();return;}

  const msgs=[
    [{sp:'旁白',text:'房間裡，所有記憶都回來了……一道彩虹光柱出現了！'},{sp:'薯條',text:'是通往星空的路！我要出發了！'}],
    [{sp:'星光神鹿',text:'做得好，小兔子。你的愛，喚醒了所有的星光。'},{sp:'星光神鹿',text:'拿著這對小翅膀，前往彩虹試煉吧。'}],
    [{sp:'旁白',text:'天堂大門打開了！所有靈魂夥伴歡聲雷動！'},{sp:'薯條',text:'等等，我看到了什麼……有一條光束通往主人的夢境！'}],
  ];
  showDlgSeq(msgs[stage],()=>{
    const fl=document.getElementById('flash');
    fl.classList.add('on');
    setTimeout(()=>{
      fl.classList.remove('on');
      stageComplete=false;
      if(next===1)initStage2();
      else if(next===2)initStage3();
      else initStage4();
      showStageTitle(next,()=>{});
    },500);
  });
}
function checkStageComplete4(){
  // Handled by nudgeOwner
}

// ── DRAW RABBIT ───────────────────────────────────────
function drawPlayer(){
  const sx=player.x-cameraX, sy=player.y;
  const bob=Math.sin(player.anim)*3*(player.onGround?1:0);
  ctx.save();
  ctx.globalAlpha=player.ghostAlpha;
  if(player.facing<0)ctx.scale(-1,1);
  const fx=player.facing<0?-(sx*2+player.w):0;

  // Glow
  const g=ctx.createRadialGradient(sx+player.w/2+fx,sy+player.h/2,2,sx+player.w/2+fx,sy+player.h/2,28);
  g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(212,168,74,0.2)'); g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(212,168,74,0)');
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(sx+player.w/2+fx,sy+player.h/2,28,22,0,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=g; ctx.fill();

  const bx=sx+fx, by=sy+bob;
  // Body
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+18,by+30,16,13,0,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle='#d0c8b8'; ctx.fill();
  // Back patch
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+16,by+26,10,8,-.2,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle='#787060'; ctx.fill();
  // Head
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+22,by+16,11,10,0,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle='#d0c8b8'; ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+20,by+15,7,6,.1,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle='#686058'; ctx.fill();
  // Ears
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+17,by+6,3.5,9,-.2,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='#c0b8a8'; ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+17,by+6,2,7,-.2,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,120,120,0.4)'; ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+24,by+5,3.5,9,.15,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='#c0b8a8'; ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+24,by+5,2,7,.15,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,120,120,0.4)'; ctx.fill();
  // Eye
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(bx+25,by+14,3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='#1a0808'; ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(bx+26,by+13,1,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'; ctx.fill();
  // Nose
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(bx+28,by+17,2.5,2,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='#d07070'; ctx.fill();
  // Tail
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(bx+6,by+32,5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='#f0ece0'; ctx.fill();

  ctx.restore();
}

// ── DRAW WORLD ────────────────────────────────────────
function drawWorld(){
  const s=STAGES[stage];
  // Background
  const bg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);
  bg.addColorStop(0,s.bgColor[0]); bg.addColorStop(0.5,s.bgColor[1]); bg.addColorStop(1,s.bgColor[2]);
  ctx.fillStyle=bg; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);

  // Stars (stages 1,2)
  if(stage<=1){
    for(let i=0;i<80;i++){
      const sx=(i*137.5*7+t*0.3)%W, sy=(i*73.1)%H*0.65;
      const a=0.2+0.5*Math.sin(t*0.03+i*0.5);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx,sy,0.8+Math.random()*0.6,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(255,245,215,${a})`; ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  // Rainbow (stage 3)
  if(stage===2){
    const colors=['#ff4060','#ff8020','#ffd020','#40d040','#2080ff','#8040ff'];
    colors.forEach((c,i)=>{
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(W/2,H*1.2,H*0.6+i*30,Math.PI,0);
      ctx.strokeStyle=c; ctx.lineWidth=18; ctx.globalAlpha=0.15;
      ctx.stroke(); ctx.globalAlpha=1;
    });
    // River
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(40,120,200,0.25)'; ctx.fillRect(0,H*0.8,W,H*0.2);
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(100,180,255,0.2)';
    for(let i=0;i<8;i++)ctx.fillRect(i*W/8+(t*0.5%(W/8)),H*0.78,W/8*0.7,8);
  }

  // Dream scene (stage 4)
  if(stage===3){
    // Warm room glow
    const dg=ctx.createRadialGradient(W*0.6,H*0.5,40,W*0.6,H*0.5,W*0.7);
    dg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,220,150,0.18)'); dg.addColorStop(0.5,'rgba(255,180,80,0.06)'); dg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    ctx.fillStyle=dg; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    // Floating dream particles
    for(let i=0;i<12;i++){
      const px2=(i*173+t*0.4)%W, py2=H*0.2+Math.sin(t*0.02+i)*H*0.25;
      const a=0.15+0.1*Math.sin(t*0.04+i*0.7);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(px2,py2,2+Math.sin(t*0.03+i)*1,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(255,220,150,${a})`; ctx.fill();
    }
    // Soft curtain / window suggestion
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(80,40,10,0.2)';
    ctx.fillRect(W*0.75,0,W*0.08,H*0.6);
    ctx.fillRect(W*0.85,0,W*0.08,H*0.6);
  }

  // Stage 2: visible glowing ground
  if(stage===1){
    const fy=FLOOR_Y();
    // Glowing purple ground strip
    const gg=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,fy-30,0,H);
    gg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(160,80,220,0)');
    gg.addColorStop(0.15,'rgba(160,80,220,0.55)');
    gg.addColorStop(0.5,'rgba(100,40,160,0.8)');
    gg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(60,10,100,1)');
    ctx.fillStyle=gg; ctx.fillRect(0,fy-30,W,H-(fy-30));
    // Bright glowing line at floor level
    const gl=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,W,0);
    gl.addColorStop(0,'rgba(200,120,255,0.2)');
    gl.addColorStop(0.5,'rgba(200,120,255,0.7)');
    gl.addColorStop(1,'rgba(200,120,255,0.2)');
    ctx.fillStyle=gl; ctx.fillRect(0,fy-3,W,4);
    // Sparkle dots along ground
    for(let i=0;i<20;i++){
      const gx=(i*173+t*0.5)%W;
      const ga=0.3+0.4*Math.sin(t*0.06+i*0.8);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(gx,fy-2,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(220,160,255,${ga})`; ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  // Platforms
  platforms.forEach(p=>{
    ctx.save();
    if(p.cloud){
      // Bright cloud with clear landing zone
      ctx.globalAlpha=0.92;
      ctx.fillStyle=p.col;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(p.x-cameraX+p.w/2,p.y+p.h/2,p.w/2,p.h/2+8,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(p.x-cameraX+p.w*0.3,p.y,p.w*0.22,p.h,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(p.x-cameraX+p.w*0.7,p.y+2,p.w*0.18,p.h*0.85,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
      // Bright top edge (landing surface)
      ctx.globalAlpha=1;
      ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,200,255,0.9)'; ctx.lineWidth=3;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(p.x-cameraX+p.w*0.12, p.y+4);
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(p.x-cameraX+p.w*0.3,p.y-8, p.x-cameraX+p.w*0.7,p.y-8, p.x-cameraX+p.w*0.88,p.y+4);
      ctx.stroke();
      // "可踩" label + arrow pointing down to cloud
      const cxc = p.x-cameraX+p.w/2;
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,220,255,0.85)'; ctx.font='11px "Noto Serif TC"'; ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText('可踩 ↓', cxc, p.y-18);
      ctx.textAlign='left';
    } else {
      ctx.fillStyle=p.col; ctx.fillRect(p.x-cameraX,p.y,p.w,p.h);
      // Platform shine
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'; ctx.fillRect(p.x-cameraX,p.y,p.w,4);
    }
    ctx.restore();
  });

  // Memory / collect items
  memItems.forEach(item=>{
    if(item.done)return;
    const ix=item.x-cameraX;
    const bob=Math.sin(t*0.04+item.x*0.01)*5;
    // Glow
    const ig=ctx.createRadialGradient(ix+item.w/2,item.y+item.h/2+bob,2,ix+item.w/2,item.y+item.h/2+bob,30);
    const glowCol = item.col.startsWith('rgba')||item.col.startsWith('rgb') ? item.col : item.col+'88';
    ig.addColorStop(0,glowCol); ig.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ix+item.w/2,item.y+item.h/2+bob,30,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=ig; ctx.fill();
    // Icon
    ctx.font=`${item.w}px serif`; ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(item.icon,ix+item.w/2,item.y+item.h+bob);
    // Pulse ring
    const pr=22+Math.sin(t*0.05)*5;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ix+item.w/2,item.y+item.h/2+bob,pr,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.strokeStyle=item.col.startsWith('rgba')||item.col.startsWith('rgb') ? item.col : item.col+'88';
    ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.stroke();
    ctx.textAlign='left';
  });

  // Stage 2: deer
  if(stage===1&&deer){
    const dx=deer.x-cameraX;
    if(dx>-60&&dx<W+60){
      ctx.globalAlpha=deer.awake?1:0.35;
      ctx.font='52px serif'; ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText('🦌',dx,deer.y);
      if(deer.awake){
        ctx.font='16px serif';
        ctx.fillStyle='rgba(212,168,74,0.8)';
        ctx.fillText('神鹿',dx,deer.y+20);
      }
      ctx.globalAlpha=1; ctx.textAlign='left';
    }
  }

  // Stage 4: NPC owner
  if(stage===3&&npc){
    const nx=npc.x-cameraX;
    ctx.globalAlpha=0.92;
    // Draw owner as real photo
    if(typeof ownerImg!=='undefined'&&ownerImg.complete&&ownerImg.naturalWidth>0){
      const ow=70, oh=90;
      const ox=nx-ow/2, oy=npc.y-5, rr=10;
      ctx.save();
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(ox+rr,oy);
      ctx.lineTo(ox+ow-rr,oy); ctx.arcTo(ox+ow,oy,ox+ow,oy+rr,rr);
      ctx.lineTo(ox+ow,oy+oh-rr); ctx.arcTo(ox+ow,oy+oh,ox+ow-rr,oy+oh,rr);
      ctx.lineTo(ox+rr,oy+oh); ctx.arcTo(ox,oy+oh,ox,oy+oh-rr,rr);
      ctx.lineTo(ox,oy+rr); ctx.arcTo(ox,oy,ox+rr,oy,rr);
      ctx.closePath(); ctx.clip();
      ctx.drawImage(ownerImg,ox,oy,ow,oh);
      ctx.restore();
      const glowCol=npc.state==='smiling'?'rgba(255,220,100,0.85)':'rgba(200,180,255,0.5)';
      ctx.strokeStyle=glowCol; ctx.lineWidth=2.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(ox+rr,oy); ctx.lineTo(ox+ow-rr,oy); ctx.arcTo(ox+ow,oy,ox+ow,oy+rr,rr);
      ctx.lineTo(ox+ow,oy+oh-rr); ctx.arcTo(ox+ow,oy+oh,ox+ow-rr,oy+oh,rr);
      ctx.lineTo(ox+rr,oy+oh); ctx.arcTo(ox,oy+oh,ox,oy+oh-rr,rr);
      ctx.lineTo(ox,oy+rr); ctx.arcTo(ox,oy,ox+rr,oy,rr);
      ctx.closePath(); ctx.stroke();
    } else {
      ctx.font='52px serif'; ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText(npc.state==='smiling'?'😊':'😴',nx,npc.y+npc.h);
    }
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(240,200,120,0.85)'; ctx.font='13px "Noto Serif TC"'; ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('主人',nx,npc.y+100);
    // Light beam
    if(!ownerNudged){
      const bg2=ctx.createLinearGradient(nx,0,nx,npc.y);
      bg2.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,220,150,0)'); bg2.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,220,150,0.3)');
      ctx.fillStyle=bg2; ctx.fillRect(nx-15,0,30,npc.y);
    }
    ctx.globalAlpha=1; ctx.textAlign='left';
  }

  // Stage 2: stars awakened
  if(stage===1){
    for(let i=0;i<stageScore;i++){
      const sx2=(i*183+200)%(W+cameraX)-cameraX, sy2=H*0.1+i*30;
      ctx.font='20px serif'; ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.globalAlpha=0.5+0.5*Math.sin(t*0.06+i);
      ctx.fillText('✦',sx2,sy2);
      ctx.globalAlpha=1;
    }
    ctx.textAlign='left';
  }

  // Particles
  particles=particles.filter(p=>p.life>0);
  particles.forEach(p=>{
    p.x+=p.vx; p.y+=p.vy; p.vy+=0.12; p.life-=0.025;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x-cameraX,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=p.col+(Math.floor(p.life*255).toString(16).padStart(2,'0'));
    ctx.fill();
  });

  // Proximity indicator
  memItems.forEach(item=>{
    if(item.done)return;
    const dist=Math.abs((player.x+player.w/2)-(item.x+item.w/2));
    const distY=Math.abs((player.y+player.h/2)-(item.y+item.h/2));
    const showDist = stage===1 ? 110 : 80;
    if(dist<showDist&&distY<120){
      const ix=item.x-cameraX+item.w/2;
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(212,168,74,0.9)'; ctx.font='12px "Noto Serif TC"';
      ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('[ 互動 ]',ix,item.y-8);
      ctx.textAlign='left';
    }
  });
  if(stage===3&&npc&&!ownerNudged){
    const npcDist=Math.abs((player.x+player.w/2)-(npc.x+npc.w/2));
    if(npcDist<150){
      const nx=npc.x-cameraX+npc.w/2;
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,220,150,0.95)'; ctx.font='13px "Noto Serif TC"';
      ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('[ 互動 ] 靠近主人',nx,npc.y-15);
      // Pulsing arrow pointing to owner
      const pulse=0.5+0.5*Math.sin(t*0.08);
      ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(255,220,100,${pulse})`;
      ctx.fillText('▼',nx,npc.y-2);
      ctx.textAlign='left';
    }
  }

  // Stage background image overlay (faint)
  const bgImg=sceneImgs[STAGES[stage].bgKey];
  if(bgImg&&bgImg.complete&&bgImg.naturalWidth>0){
    ctx.globalAlpha=0.08;
    ctx.drawImage(bgImg,0,0,W,H);
    ctx.globalAlpha=1;
  }
}

// ── MAIN LOOP ─────────────────────────────────────────
function loop(){
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  t++;
  if(!gameRunning)return;
  if(!dlgOpen)updatePhysics();
  drawWorld();
  drawPlayer();

  // Stage 2: check deer proximity
  if(stage===1&&!deer.awake&&stageScore>=stageTotal){
    const dist=Math.abs(player.x-deer.x);
    if(dist<100){
      deer.awake=true;
      showDlgSeq([
        {sp:'星光神鹿',text:'……你喚醒了我。謝謝你，小兔子。'},
        {sp:'星光神鹿',text:'想去天堂，要先學會好好說再見。'},
        {sp:'星光神鹿',text:'拿著這對小翅膀，繼續前行吧。'},
      ],()=>setTimeout(()=>checkStageComplete(),500));
    }
  }
}

// ── START ─────────────────────────────────────────────
document.getElementById('startBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.getElementById('intro').classList.add('hide');
  // Start music on user gesture (required by browsers)
  setTimeout(startMusic, 1500);
  setTimeout(()=>{
    document.getElementById('intro').style.display='none';
    gameRunning=true; stageComplete=false;
    initStage1();
    showStageTitle(0,()=>{
      showDlgSeq([
        {sp:'旁白', text:'薯條醒來，發現自己變成了半透明的靈魂……'},
        {sp:'薯條', text:'這是……我的家？好熟悉的味道。'},
        {sp:'薯條', text:'讓我最後再摸摸每一樣東西……'},
        {sp:'旁白', text:'靠近發光的物品，按「互動」收集記憶碎片。'},
      ],null);
    });
  },1400);
  loop();
});
document.getElementById('replayBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>location.reload());
</script>

<script>
// Inject images after DOM is ready
(function(){
  // This will be replaced by Python with actual base64 data
})();

// ── VIDEO PLAYER ──────────────────────────────────────
let vidCB = null, skipTimer = null;

function playVideo(cb) {
  if (videoIndex >= VIDEOS.length) { if(cb) cb(); return; }
  const vid = VIDEOS[videoIndex];
  videoIndex++;
  const overlay = document.getElementById('vid-overlay');
  const skipBtn = document.getElementById('vid-skip');
  const numEl = document.getElementById('vid-num');
  if (!overlay) { if(cb) cb(); return; }  // safety: if DOM not ready, skip

  // Set YouTube Shorts link
  const ytUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/shorts/' + vid;
  document.getElementById('yt-link-btn').href = ytUrl;
  numEl.textContent = '第 ' + videoIndex + ' / ' + VIDEOS.length + ' 段';

  overlay.style.display = 'flex';
  vidCB = cb;

  // Show skip button after 3s
  skipBtn.style.opacity = '0';
  skipBtn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
  clearTimeout(skipTimer);
  skipTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    skipBtn.style.opacity = '1';
    skipBtn.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
  }, 3000);
}

function closeVideo() {
  try {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('vid-overlay');
    const skipBtn = document.getElementById('vid-skip');
    if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
    if (skipBtn) { skipBtn.style.opacity = '0'; skipBtn.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; }
  } catch(e) {}
  clearTimeout(skipTimer);
  const cb = vidCB; vidCB = null;
  if (cb) setTimeout(cb, 150);
}

// Attach video overlay listeners after DOM ready
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  try {
    var rabEl = document.getElementById('vid-rabbit-img');
    if(rabEl) rabEl.src = IMG_RABBIT;
    var skipEl = document.getElementById('vid-skip');
    if (skipEl) {
      skipEl.addEventListener('click', closeVideo);
      skipEl.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault(); closeVideo();
      }, {passive: false});
    }
  } catch(err) {}
});

// YouTube postMessage (video ended) - ignore cross-origin errors silently
window.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
  try {
    if(!e.data) return;
    const d = typeof e.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(e.data) : e.data;
    if (!d || typeof d !== 'object') return;
    if ((d.event === 'onStateChange' && d.info === 0) ||
        (d.info && typeof d.info === 'object' && d.info.playerState === 0)) {
      if (vidCB) closeVideo();
    }
  } catch(_) { /* ignore cross-origin errors */ }
});


// ── 天主教水晶音樂盒 ──────────────────────────────────
// Ave Maria 旋律片段 (Schubert) — 以音符頻率表示
// 用 Web Audio API 合成，不需要外部音檔
let audioCtx = null;
let musicPlaying = false;
let musicNodes = [];
let musicTimeout = null;

// Ave Maria 簡化旋律 (C大調) — 頻率(Hz) 和 時值(秒)
const AVE_MARIA = [
  // 第一句: A-ve Ma-ri-a
  [523.25,0.6],[587.33,0.3],[523.25,0.3],[659.25,0.6],[587.33,0.6],
  [523.25,0.6],[493.88,0.3],[523.25,0.3],[587.33,1.2],
  // 第二句: gra-ti-a ple-na
  [659.25,0.6],[698.46,0.3],[659.25,0.3],[783.99,0.6],[739.99,0.6],
  [659.25,0.6],[587.33,0.3],[659.25,0.3],[523.25,1.5],
  // 第三句: Do-mi-nus te-cum
  [392.00,0.6],[440.00,0.3],[392.00,0.3],[493.88,0.6],[440.00,0.6],
  [392.00,0.6],[349.23,0.3],[392.00,0.3],[440.00,1.2],
  // 第四句: be-ne-dic-ta tu
  [523.25,0.6],[587.33,0.3],[523.25,0.3],[659.25,0.6],[587.33,0.6],
  [523.25,0.9],[440.00,0.3],[392.00,0.3],[349.23,0.3],[523.25,1.8],
];

function initAudio() {
  if (audioCtx) return;
  try {
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  } catch(e) { console.log('Audio not supported'); }
}

function playNote(freq, startTime, duration, volume) {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  try {
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
    // 水晶音樂盒音色：正弦波 + 泛音
    osc.type = 'sine';
    osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, startTime);
    // 音量包絡：快速起音，緩慢衰減（鈴鐺感）
    gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0, startTime);
    gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(volume, startTime + 0.02);
    gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, startTime + duration * 1.8);
    // 加一點泛音讓音色更豐富
    const osc2 = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain2 = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc2.type = 'sine';
    osc2.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq * 2, startTime);
    gain2.gain.setValueAtTime(0, startTime);
    gain2.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(volume * 0.15, startTime + 0.01);
    gain2.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, startTime + duration);
    osc.connect(gainNode);
    gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc2.connect(gain2);
    gain2.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.start(startTime);
    osc.stop(startTime + duration * 2);
    osc2.start(startTime);
    osc2.stop(startTime + duration * 1.5);
  } catch(e) {}
}

function playMusicLoop() {
  if (!audioCtx || !musicPlaying) return;
  const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
  let time = now + 0.1;
  const VOL = 0.06; // 小小聲
  AVE_MARIA.forEach(([freq, dur]) => {
    playNote(freq, time, dur, VOL);
    time += dur + 0.05;
  });
  // 循環播放：計算總時長後重新開始
  const totalDur = AVE_MARIA.reduce((s,[,d])=>s+d+0.05, 0) * 1000 + 500;
  musicTimeout = setTimeout(playMusicLoop, totalDur);
}

function startMusic() {
  if (musicPlaying) return;
  initAudio();
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  // Resume if suspended (iOS requires user gesture)
  if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
    audioCtx.resume().then(() => {
      musicPlaying = true;
      playMusicLoop();
    });
  } else {
    musicPlaying = true;
    playMusicLoop();
  }
}

function stopMusic() {
  musicPlaying = false;
  clearTimeout(musicTimeout);
}

// 靜音/開聲切換按鈕
function toggleMusic() {
  if (musicPlaying) {
    stopMusic();
    const btn = document.getElementById('music-btn');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = '🔇';
  } else {
    startMusic();
    const btn = document.getElementById('music-btn');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = '🔔';
  }
}

// 遊戲開始時自動播放（需要用戶互動後才能啟動）
// 掛在 startBtn 點擊事件上
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // 音樂按鈕
  const musicBtn = document.getElementById('music-btn');
  if (musicBtn) {
    musicBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleMusic);
    musicBtn.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault(); toggleMusic();
    }, {passive: false});
  }
});

</script>

<!-- VIDEO OVERLAY -->

<div id="vid-overlay" style="position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:500;background:rgba(5,2,16,0.97);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;">
  <!-- Rabbit image while waiting -->
  <div style="animation:ifl 2s ease-in-out infinite;">
    <img id="vid-rabbit-img" style="width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid rgba(212,168,74,0.5);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(212,168,74,0.4);" src="" alt="薯條">
  </div>
  <div style="font-family:'Ma Shan Zheng',cursive;font-size:1.4rem;color:#f0cc70;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(212,168,74,0.5);">薯條的故事</div>
  <div id="vid-num" style="font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(212,168,74,0.5);letter-spacing:0.3em;"></div>
  <!-- Big YouTube button -->
  <a id="yt-link-btn" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
    style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;background:#ff0000;color:#fff;
    font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:1rem;padding:0.9em 2em;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(255,0,0,0.4);">
    <span style="font-size:1.5rem;">▶</span> 點擊觀看影片
  </a>
  <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:rgba(212,168,74,0.4);text-align:center;max-width:240px;line-height:1.8;">
    影片將在 YouTube 開啟<br>看完後回到此頁繼續遊戲
  </div>
  <!-- Skip / Continue button -->
  <button id="vid-skip" style="background:rgba(5,2,16,.9);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,74,.5);color:#d4a84a;font-family:'Noto Serif TC',serif;font-size:.88rem;padding:.65em 2.2em;letter-spacing:.15em;cursor:pointer;opacity:0;transition:opacity .6s;pointer-events:none;">略過，繼續遊戲 ▶</button>
  <!-- Hidden iframe (kept for postMessage, but hidden) -->
  <iframe id="yt-frame" style="display:none;" src=""></iframe>
</div>

</body>
